name: Pineapple Lemon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar, lemon peel, first 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg, and melted margarine in a bowl.
2. Divide this mixture evenly among 16 greased muffin cups.
3. Add a spoonful of drained crushed pineapple and one cherry half to each cup.
4. In another bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and remaining nutmeg.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the beaten egg, skim milk, and vegetable oil (blended well).
6. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just moistened and no streaks remain.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake in a 375 degree F oven for 18 to 20 minutes or until done.
9. Remove from the oven and immediately invert the muffins onto a wire rack to cool.
